codeReview.summary: The fix commit addresses the two blocking failures from swap-confirmation-modal and the blocking auto-refresh regression from progressive-quotes-implementation. The progressive flow now resolves with a payload for auto-refresh gating, single-router mode is set before streaming begins (so swap bypasses modal on unsupported Curve chains), and the swap confirmation modal now traps Tab/Shift+Tab focus while restoring focus to the originating swap button on close.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared modal implementation guidance still under-specifies accessibility behavior: it documents overlay/Escape/body-scroll/aria, but not focus trapping. This gap likely contributed to the original missing focus-trap defect.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md (Modal pattern section) and mission AGENTS.md (Modal pattern section) both omit explicit Tab/Shift+Tab focus-loop guidance, while prior review .factory/validation/progressive-quotes/scrutiny/reviews/swap-confirmation-modal.json failed on missing focus trap.

summary: Pass: fix-progressive-quotes-scrutiny adequately resolves the previously reported blocking failures across both referenced features, and transcript/diff evidence is consistent with the intended remediation.
